title: LB Photo Realism Reload!
description: Reloaded version of one of the most realistic resourcepacks - LB Photo Realism
body:
_Follow the latest development news on my [discord server](https://discord.gg/pq9bnfu)!_

"LB Photo Realism Reload!" is a photo realistic resourcepack based on work of Scuttles (LB Photo Realism). "Reloaded" version is very different from the original, because it uses very old textures of LBPR. The main purpose of this resourcepack is to make minecraft look not only realistic, but also to make it beautiful and attractive for new players. LBPR Reload is pretty close to default Minecraft textures, so it won't be a big issue to start playing with it. The pack includes many 3D-models, animations and randomized textures. 

 
*This pack is 100% free, but if you want to support me and help me pay my food and rent, feel free to [leave a donation](https://ko-fi.com/1lots)!*


### Credits

- ​Scuttles' LB PhotoRealism: [Thread](http://www.minecraftforum.net/topic/127377-16x-32x-64x-128x-256x16-lb-photo-realism-16-convert-7162013-rpg-realism-131-updated-10122012/)
- GKrond's version of LBPR: [Website](https://www.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=http%253a%252f%252fwww.gkrond.ru%252fTexturesForMinecraft%252findex.html)
- Misa's Realistic pack: [CF Page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/misas-realistic)
